title: If the user overrides the storage driver, the options should be dropped
body:
Since the driver options are configured in storage.conf based on the selected
driver then the user overrideing them should cause the options to drop.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
If it's just the md that's a bit ugly, then we can play later.  I say ship it as is and we'll adjust.
LGTM.

:pushpin: Commit f3f88b5 has been approved by `rhatdan`
